div.p: peak_memory = old_model + new_model + activations + overhead = 1.0 GB + 1.0 GB + 1.6 GB + 0.4 GB = 4.0 GB (100% capacity)
⚠️ Critical: During hot swap, GPU runs at 100% capacity with zero safety margin. Mitigation strategies:

ol.li: Use smaller batch sizes during swap window
Load model to CPU first, then move to GPU
Ensure old model is draining (no new inferences)
